case_title: MARILYN KAZEE VS. PETER D. GREELEY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. ON SEPTEMBER 18, 2017 PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND REACHED AN AGREEMENT. PURSUANT TO THE SIGNED MEDIATION AGREEMENT IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE OCTOBER 23, 2017 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF MARILYN KAZEE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PETER GREELEY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-02-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GREELEY, PETER D.
